title: Pigs Might Fly
description: Adds a potion to make pigs fly!
body:
This mod adds a potion which can be given to a pig which turns them into flying pigs. Riding a flying pig with a carrot on a stick will give you movement in all directions.

The crafting recipe for the potion is shapeless and requires: 1 Feather, 1 Phantom Membrance, 1 Rabbit's Foot and 1 Dragon Breath.
